_doc: BSN unit acronym -> full Thai. Confirmed by Put 2026-05-18. ปน=ปื้น, กส=กระสอบ, บล=แผง, ดก=ดอก (drill bits ดจ., Put-confirmed; was a missed acronym found via pid 294). Other ~19 missing acronyms pending Put review in data/exports/acronym_missing_review_20260518.csv. | 2026-05-18b: +18 acronyms from Put-reviewed acronym_missing_review CSV (หค=โหลคู่, กร=ตัว, etc.; คค skipped — ค่าขนส่ง).
